files.content: {"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Product Enrichment API","version":"1.0.0","description":"Custom product enrichment service via I/O Runtime"},"servers":[{"url":"https://3967933-670bluesmelt-stage.adobeioruntime.net/api/v1/web/my-commerce-extension"}],"paths":{"/product-enrichment":{"get":{"operationId":"getProductEnrichment","summary":"Get enriched product data","parameters":[{"name":"sku","in":"query","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The product SKU to enrich"}],"responses":{"200":{"description":"Enriched product data","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"sku":{"type":"string"},"name":{"type":"string"},"price":{"type":"number"},"sustainabilityScore":{"type":"integer"},"estimatedDelivery":{"type":"string"},"enrichedAt":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}}}}}
